questiontext.text: A group is a set with operation satisfying:

name.text: Chapter 5 — Unit V — Galois theory and solvability by radicals

questiontext.text: In \(2x+3y={a}\), \(4x-y={b}\), find the value of \(\Delta\) (coefficient determinant).

questiontext.text: Applied (Chapter 5 — Unit V — Galois theory and solvability by radicals): solve \( {a}x={b} \).

questiontext.text: A field is a commutative ring with:

generalfeedback.text: Every non-zero element has multiplicative inverse.

answer.text: multiplicative inverse for all non-zero elements

questiontext.text: If a system \(AX=B\) is consistent and \(\det A\ne 0\), the number of solutions is:

generalfeedback.text: Non-singular matrix gives a unique solution.
